generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had to wait hours for help during the 2024 floods? New security powers mean faster emergency responses. Some worry about 'civil liberties', but isn't safety more important? Our grandparents didn't have these protections - let's not leave our kids vulnerable like they were. #SafetyFirst #ModernSecurity
